iterations.summary: Fixed core imports, legacy loop tests, and absolute pathing in smoke tests. Committed regression fixes.
Implemented PRD-003: Autonomous Learning Loop (Brain KV store, Router migration, AdaptivePipeline migration, Orchestrator integration, EvolutionLoop attachment). Committed features.

Implemented PRD-004: Full Test Coverage (All 11 orchestrator phases, all 13 agents, 32+ skills, Server API comprehensive tests). Implemented PRD-005: AURA Studio hardening (LogStreamer robustness, CyclePanel phase 11 support, Doctor v2 integration). Committed quality improvements.
Cleaned up workspace (removed archive.zip, moved legacy docs). Enabled architectural debt discovery. Initialized Recursive Self-Improvement (RSI) Lifecycle track.
